titleStmt.title: The Netherland Legation to the Department of State

head.hi: The Netherland Legation to the Department of State
head.note: Handed on November 21 to the Adviser on Political Relations (Hornbeck) by the Netherland Minister (Loudon); noted by the Secretary of State.

div.p: According to information received by the Governor General of the Netherlands East Indies a Japanese Expeditionary Force has arrived in the vicinity of Palao.

Should this force, [which is]The bracketed words were inserted by Dr. Hornbeck with the following notation: “Mr. Loudon stated that his telegram contained this affirmation.” strong enough to form a threat for the Netherlands East Indies or for Portuguese Timor, move beyond a line between following points: Davao–Waigeo–Equator, the Governor General will regard this as an act of aggression and will under those circumstances consider the hostilities opened and act accordingly.
